text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Mar  2 05:49:40 2013
New Revision: 313196
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313196

Log:
  - Update to 0.7.5
  - Trim header
  
  PR:		176533
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/science/pynn/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/science/pynn/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/science/pynn/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/science/pynn/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 05:48:59 2013	(r313195)
+++ head/science/pynn/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 05:49:40 2013	(r313196)
@@ -1,19 +1,15 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for: pynn
-# Date created:			12 May 2010
-# Whom:				Ju Pengfei <jupengfei@gmail.com>
-#
+# Created by: Ju Pengfei <jupengfei@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	pynn
-PORTVERSION=	0.7.4
+PORTVERSION=	0.7.5
 CATEGORIES=	science python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	PyNN-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A simulator-independent language for building neuronal network models
+COMMENT=	Simulator-independent language for building neuronal network models
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY}
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYNUMPY}
